purpose: Shared visual style referenced by every other prompt batch. Not a generation task by itself.

style_base.type: 3D Pixar-style chibi / polished premium mobile-game asset
style_base.rendering: octane render, soft studio lighting, smooth subsurface shading, high detail, clean glossy finish
style_base.world: dark-fantasy magical jungle kingdom ('el reino de la luz'): misty jungle, faceted low-poly rocks, glowing teal runes, warm lanterns, fireflies
reference_assets: public/avatars/avatar-explorer-3.png (face reference for the identity avatar)
negative_always: keep chibi proportions where characters appear

how_to_use: Prepend the style_base to any prompt in the other files, or rely on your tool's image-to-image reference. Keep aspect ratio and transparency as each item specifies.
